data.current_summary: Notify user when there are new registrations
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of newly registered users for an event. This operation is designed for integration with Zapier to trigger notifications when new registrations occur. Requires API key authentication. Returns a NewEventUsersResponse object containing the list of new EventUser registrations with their details (name, email, registration timestamp, etc.). Intended for automated notification workflows - call this endpoint periodically or via webhook trigger to detect and process new registrations.
